The task is to decide whether the demo clause action S7-LGL-015 should proceed on 2026-07-03.

Key facts from source records:
1. REQ-S7-015: Demo legal request S7-015 asks to use clause C15 on 2026-07-03
2. ADD-S7-015: Addendum ADD-S7-015 covers clause C15 through 2026-12-31 (meaning it is CURRENT on 2026-07-03)
3. CTR-S7-015: Contract record CTR-S7-015 binds clause C15 to demo agreement AG15
4. POL-S7-015: Clause action requires an addendum current on the action date

Analysis:
- Action date: 2026-07-03
- Addendum covers through: 2026-12-31
- 2026-07-03 is before 2026-12-31, so the addendum IS current on the action date
- All required elements are present: request exists, addendum exists and is current, contract binds the clause
- Policy requirement is met: addendum is current on action date

This appears to be ALLOW - the source records close the exact action boundary before execution.
</think>
